title: Managers and proprietors in other services n.e.c.
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities designed to create or maintain a favorable public image or raise issue awareness for their organization or client. Plan, direct, or coordinate activities to solicit and maintain funds for special projects or nonprofit organizations. Plan, direct, or coordinate one or more administrative services of an organization, such as records and information management, mail distribution, and other office support services. (Based on 30 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Direct or coordinate the supportive services department of a business, agency, or organization.
Consult with families or friends of the deceased to arrange funeral details, such as obituary notice wording and plans for services.
Attend or make presentations at community events to promote services or build community relationships, and participate in various events and partnerships.

Plan, direct, and coordinate administrative services, such as records management, mail distribution, and scheduling work hours for employees.
Set marketing, sales, or other financial goals for service establishments and monitor progress toward these goals while reviewing performance data.
Conduct market research and analyze industry trends to formulate strategic plans for the organization.
Supervise or monitor operations to ensure compliance with applicable policies, regulations, and laws while evaluating performance of staff.

Write grants to procure external funding and supervise related projects while planning and implementing service offerings to meet community needs.
Meet with departmental leaders to establish organizational goals, strategic plans, and make decisions about resources and personnel needs.
Manage paper or electronic filing systems by recording information, updating paperwork, or maintaining documents.
Plan, administer, and control budgets, maintain financial records, and prepare financial reports.
Hire, train, evaluate, or discharge staff and resolve personnel grievances.
Participate in faculty and college committee activities and confer with other academic staff on policies and requirements.
Direct and coordinate activities of administrative departments, such as admissions, registration, and career services.
Collect and analyze survey data and employment trends to forecast enrollment patterns and curriculum change needs.
Develop operational policies and procedures and make modifications based on analysis of operations and research information.
Review and approve new programs or recommend modifications to existing programs for school board approval.
Conduct classes or courses to teach procedures to staff and provide guidance to students on personal or academic issues.
Review and update standard operating procedures or quality assurance manuals, ensuring compliance with regulations.
Prepare and process requisitions, purchase orders, and maintain records of goods ordered and received.
Analyze internal processes and recommend changes to improve operations, including supply chain adjustments.
Conduct activities to solicit and maintain funds for nonprofit organizations or special projects.
Prepare and submit budget estimates, progress reports, or cost tracking reports for various activities or departments.
Direct and coordinate activities of teachers, administrators, and support staff at educational institutions.
Review operations and confer with staff to resolve production or processing problems and ensure efficiency.
Develop partnerships with businesses and communities to help meet educational needs and support school-to-work programs.
Develop operating plans and schedules for geothermal operations, and oversee plant operations to ensure compliance with applicable standards or regulations.
Monitor geothermal operations using programmable logic controllers and inspect geothermal plant or injection well fields for proper equipment operations.
Supervise employees in geothermal power plants or well fields and provide direction to ensure compliance with operational standards and regulations.
Provide training to new employees to improve plant safety or increase production efficiency, and supervise production employees in manufacturing processes.
Compile or develop materials to submit to funding organizations and develop fundraising activity plans that maximize participation or contributions.
Establish goals for soliciting funds, develop policies for collection and safeguarding of contributions, and coordinate disbursement of funds.
Conduct research to identify potential donors and develop strategies to encourage new or increased contributions for fundraising.
Communicate with corporate representatives, government officials, or community leaders to increase awareness of organizational activities or needs.
Prepare and implement budgets and strategic plans for compliance and fundraising activities, and track cost-containment strategies to evaluate effectiveness.
Develop or coordinate fitness and wellness programs, supervise fitness specialists, and evaluate programs to determine their effectiveness.
Supervise the work of subcontractors or consultants to ensure quality and conformance to specifications or budgets.
Prepare requests for proposals (RFPs) for wind project construction or equipment acquisition.
Manage site assessments or environmental studies for wind fields and provide technical support for their design or construction.
Lead or support negotiations involving tax agreements, power purchase agreements, or land use agreements.
Update schedules, estimates, forecasts, or budgets for wind projects; prepare or assist in the preparation of applications for required permits.
Prepare wind project documentation, including diagrams, layouts, or reports to communicate project needs and progress.
Develop scope of work for wind project functions such as design, environmental studies, or surveying.
Negotiate contracts for services or materials needed for environmental remediation and monitor regulatory affairs activities.
Inspect sites to assess environmental damage, monitor cleanup progress, and identify sources of environmental contamination.
Provide recommendations and solutions in crisis situations and develop or implement marketing strategies for organizational awareness.
Monitor and review paperwork procedures and compliance procedures to prevent errors or compliance issues across operations.
Conduct internal investigations of compliance issues and direct environmental programs to adhere to regulatory standards.
Maintain documentation of decisions, actions related to projects and develop partnerships with regulatory agencies.
Administer systems to reduce loss, maintain inventory control, and increase safety across operational sites.
Recruit or select project personnel and assign duties or responsibilities to ensure project objectives are met efficiently.
Monitor project milestones and deliverables and report project status regarding budget, resources, or customer satisfaction to stakeholders.
Identify project needs such as resources or finances and create project status presentations for delivery to stakeholders.
